Assets/Effect/Actor.title: Actor
Assets/Effect/Actor.description: An Actor Stat Effect modifies Actor Stats.

Assets/Effect/effect.title: Effect
Assets/Effect/effect.description: An Effect defines a modification that can be applied to one or more target Stats.

Assets/Effect/EffectPack.title: Effect Pack
Assets/Effect/EffectPack.description: An Effect Pack Stat Effect modifies Effect Pack Stats.

Assets/Effect/EffectTimerModifier.title: Effect Timer Modifier
Assets/Effect/EffectTimerModifier.description: An Effect Timer Modifier inherits from Float Stat Effect.

Assets/Effect/Injector.title: Injector
Assets/Effect/Injector.description: Injectors are processed like any other Effect. After being processed, the Injector Model referenced by the Effect is added to the target Stat.

Assets/Effect/InjectorRemoverEffect.title: Injector Remover
Assets/Effect/InjectorRemoverEffect.description: It removes Injectors from the targeted Stat. Injectors can be removed selectively based on their tags and the Actor that originally added them.

Assets/Effect/Linker.title: Linker
Assets/Effect/Linker.description: Linkers are processed like any other Effect. After being processed, the referenced Linker Model is added to the target Stat.

Assets/Effect/ModifierRemoverEffect.title: Modifier Remover
Assets/Effect/ModifierRemoverEffect.description: It removes existing Modifiers from the targeted Stat. Modifiers can be removed selectively by configuring the provided filtering options.

Assets/Effect/Numerable/Float.title: Float
Assets/Effect/Numerable/Float.description: A Float Stat Effect modifies Float Stats.

Assets/Effect/Numerable/index.title: Numerable
Assets/Effect/Numerable/index.description: A Numerable Stat Effect is the base class for Effects that modify numerable Stats, such as Float Stat Effects and Int Stat Effects.

Assets/Effect/Numerable/Int.title: Int
Assets/Effect/Numerable/Int.description: An Int Stat Effect modifies Int Stats.

Assets/Effect/String.title: String
Assets/Effect/String.description: A String Stat Effect modifies String Stats.

Assets/Effect/Vector/index.title: Vector
Assets/Effect/Vector/index.description: A Vector Stat Effect is the base class for Effects that modify vector-based Stats, including Vector2, Vector3, Vector2Int, and Vector3Int Stats.

Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector2.title: Vector2
Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector2.description: A Vector2 Stat Effect modifies Vector2 Stats.

Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector2Int.title: Vector2Int
Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector2Int.description: A Vector2Int Stat Effect modifies Vector2Int Stats.

Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector3.title: Vector3
Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector3.description: A Vector3 Stat Effect modifies Vector3 Stats.

Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector3Int.title: Vector3Int
Assets/Effect/Vector/Vector3Int.description: A Vector3Int Stat Effect modifies Vector3Int Stats.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/index.title: Adapter
Assets/Misc/Adapter/index.description: Converts a Stat value between different types or modifies it into a format required by the target processor or injector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ActorStatExtrac.title: Actor Stat Extractor
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ActorStatExtrac.description: Returns a Stat from the ActorEntity contained within an ActorStat.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/Alter.title: Alter
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/Alter.description: Returns the modified value of a Stat after applying a predefined operation.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/AlterVectorBySe.title: Alter Vector By Secondary
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/AlterVectorBySe.description: Applies a predefined vector operation between the input vector Stat and a secondary vector Stat, then returns the resulting value.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/Chain.title: Chain
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/Chain.description: Processes a Stat value through a sequence of StatValueAdapters, passing the output of each adapter as the input to the next.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/DistanceBySourc.title: Distance By Source Vector
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/DistanceBySourc.description: Returns the distance between the input vector Stat and another vector retrieved from the specified source.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/FloatToIntAlter.title: Float To Int (Altered)
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/FloatToIntAlter.description: Transforms a Float Stat into an Int value after applying a predefined modification.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/index.title: Stat Value Adapter
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/index.description: Transforms a Stat value into a format suitable for further processing.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/IntToFloatAlter.title: Int To Float (Altered)
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/IntToFloatAlter.description: Transforms an Int Stat into a Float value after applying a predefined modification.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ToUniformVector.title: To Uniform Vector
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ToUniformVector.description: Converts the value of a Stat into a uniform vector, where all components are assigned the same value.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ToVectorIndex.title: To Vector Index
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Stat/ToVectorIndex.description: Assigns the value of a Stat to a specified vector component while setting all other components to 0.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Alter.title: Alter
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Alter.description: Modifies the input value using a predefined value.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Chain.title: Chain
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Chain.description: Processes the input value through a sequence of ValueAdapters, passing the output of each adapter as the input to the next.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/index.title: Value Adapter
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/index.description: Transforms an input value into a format suitable for further processing.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/ToUniformVecto.title: To Uniform Vector
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/ToUniformVecto.description: Converts the input value into a uniform vector, where all components are assigned the same value.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/ToVectorIndex.title: To Vector Index
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/ToVectorIndex.description: Assigns the input value to a specified vector component while setting all other components to 0.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Cross.title: Cross
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Cross.description: Returns the cross product of the input vector and a predefined vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Directi.title: Direction
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Directi.description: Returns the normalized direction from the input vector to a predefined vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Dot.title: Dot
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Dot.description: Returns the dot product of the input vector and a predefined vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Normali.title: Normalize
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Normali.description: Returns the normalized version of the input vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Project.title: Project On Plane
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Project.description: Projects the input vector onto a predefined plane and returns the projected vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Reflect.title: Reflect
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Reflect.description: Returns the reflection of the input vector using a predefined normal vector.

Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Substra.title: Subtract
Assets/Misc/Adapter/Value/Vector/Substra.description: Subtracts a predefined vector from the input vector and returns the result.

Assets/Misc/Injector/index.title: Injector
Assets/Misc/Injector/index.description: Injectors transform a stat's value according to their configuration.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorDefinitionM.title: Injector Definition Model
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorDefinitionM.description: Stores an InjectorModel and the order in which it will be injected.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Absol.title: Absolute Value
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Absol.description: Sets the Stat value to a predefined injector value.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Alter.title: Alter Modifiers
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Alter.description: Modifies the modifier values applied to a Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Combi.title: Combine
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Combi.description: Modifies the Stat value using the injected value according to the selected ContributionType.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/index.title: Injector Model
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/index.description: Injects a value into a Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Limit.title: Limit
Assets/Misc/Injector/InjectorModel/Limit.description: Limits the Stat value according to the injected value and the configured limit definition.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorDefinit.title: Stat Injector Definition Model
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorDefinit.description: Stores a StatInjectorModel and the order in which it will be injected.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.title: Absolute Value
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.description: Sets the target Stat value to the value of the injector Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.title: Add
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.description: Adds the value of the injector Stat to the target Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.title: Add Value By Condition
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.description: Adds the value of the injector Stat to the target Stat only if the specified condition is met.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.title: Alter Modifiers
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/A.description: Modifies the modifier values applied to the target Stat according to the configured definition.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/E.title: Eased Value
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/E.description: Uses the injector Stat value as the easing duration, then multiplies the result by the EasedValue Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/i.title: Stat Injector Model
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/i.description: Injects the value of one Stat into another Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/L.title: Limit
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/L.description: Limits the target Stat value according to the value of the injector Stat and the configured limit definition.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/M.title: Multiply
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/M.description: Multiplies the target Stat value by the value of the injector Stat.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/M.title: Multiply Value By Condition
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/M.description: Multiplies the target Stat value by the value of the injector Stat only if the specified condition is met.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/R.title: Rate
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/R.description: Applies the value of the injector Stat as a rate to the target Stat value.

Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/R.title: Rate Value By Condition
Assets/Misc/Injector/StatInjectorModel/R.description: Applies the value of the injector Stat as a rate to the target Stat value only if the specified condition is met.

Assets/Misc/PremadeAssetPack.title: Premade Asset Pack
Assets/Misc/PremadeAssetPack.description: Premade Asset Pack (PAP) is an editor asset designed to simplify the creation of frequently used assets that do not contain Stat relations.

Assets/Misc/PremadeRelationPack.title: Premade Relation Pack
Assets/Misc/PremadeRelationPack.description: Premade Relation Pack (PRP) is an editor asset designed to simplify the creation of frequently used Stat relation setups.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dif.title: Difference
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dif.description: A Difference Condition subtracts one Stat value from another and evaluates the result using a comparison condition.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dis.title: Dispatcher Condition
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dis.description: A Dispatcher Condition contains multiple conditions and evaluates the incoming Stats against all of them.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dis.title: Distance
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dis.description: A Distance Condition calculates the distance between two Vector Stats and evaluates the result using a comparison condition.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dot.title: Dot
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Dot.description: A Dot Condition calculates the dot product of two Vector Stats and evaluates the result using a comparison condition.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/ind.title: Multi Stat
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/ind.description: Multi Stat Conditions are used when a condition needs to evaluate multiple Stats instead of a single Stat.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Sum.title: Sum
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Sum.description: A Sum Condition adds two Stat values together and evaluates the result using a comparison condition.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Vec.title: Vector Index
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/ MultiStat/Vec.description: A Vector Index Condition compares the values of the selected component from two Vector Stats using a Numerable Comparer.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/index.title: Stat Condition
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/index.description: A Stat Condition checks whether a Stat satisfies a specified condition.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/MultiStatDynam.title: Multi Stat (Dynamic)
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/MultiStatDynam.description: Similar to MultiStatCondition, but instead of using predefined comparison values, all comparison values are retrieved dynamically from Stats.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Act.title: Actor Null Check
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Act.description: An Actor Null Check verifies whether the Actor referenced by an Actor Stat exists.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Num.title: Numerable Comparer
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Num.description: A Numerable Comparer evaluates whether a numerable value satisfies a comparison rule.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Str.title: String Comparer
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Str.description: A String Comparer checks whether a string value is equal to another string value.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Vec.title: Vector Index
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Vec.description: A Vector Index checks whether a specific component of a vector satisfies a comparison rule.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Vec.title: Vector Magnitude
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStat/Vec.description: A Vector Magnitude checks whether the magnitude of a vector satisfies a comparison rule.

Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStatDyna.title: Single Stat (Dynamic)
Assets/Misc/StatCondition/SingleStatDyna.description: Unlike SingleStatCondition, this condition does not use a predefined comparison value. Instead, both the target value and the comparison value are retrieved dynamically from Stats.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/index.title: Stat Scaler
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/index.description: Returns a multiplier calculated from one or more Stats.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/Distance.title: Distance
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/Distance.description: Calculates the distance between two vector Stats, maps the result using a ValueMapper, and returns the resulting multiplier.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/Dot.title: Dot
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/Dot.description: Calculates the dot product between two vector Stats, maps the result using a ValueMapper, and returns the resulting multiplier.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/index.title: Multi
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Multi/index.description: Calculates and returns a multiplier using multiple Stats.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Single/index.title: Single
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Single/index.description: A StatScaler that calculates its multiplier using a single Stat.

Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Single/MapValue.title: Map Value
Assets/Misc/StatScaler/Single/MapValue.description: Maps a Stat value from one range to another and returns the resulting multiplier.

Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/CounterE.title: Counter Effect
Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/CounterE.description: The Counter Effect Processor triggers another Effect after the current Effect has been successfully applied.

Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/index.title: Postprocessors
Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/index.description: The Postprocessor stage contains all Processors that execute after an Effect has been successfully applied.

Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/Modifier.title: Modifier Replacer
Assets/Processor/Postprocessors/Modifier.description: The Modifier Replacer Processor replaces an existing Modifier when adding a new Modifier would exceed the configured replacement limit.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Attribute.title: Attribute Stat Eliminator
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Attribute.description: The Attribute Stat Eliminator Processor determines which Attribute Stats should participate in processing for Attribute Stat Effects and Multi Attribute Stat Effects.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/CastRestr.title: Cast Restrictor
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/CastRestr.description: The Cast Restrictor Processor determines whether the Source Actor is allowed to apply an Effect.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/CounterEf.title: Counter Effect
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/CounterEf.description: The Counter Effect Processor triggers another Effect before the current Effect is applied.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Director.title: Director
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Director.description: The Director Processor forwards the original, unprocessed Effect to another Actor before the current Effect continues through the processing pipeline.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/EffectAtt.title: Effect Attribute Eliminator
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/EffectAtt.description: The Effect Attribute Eliminator Processor removes Effect Attributes before the Effect continues through the processing pipeline.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/HitRate.title: Hit Rate
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/HitRate.description: The Hit Rate Processor determines whether an Effect successfully hits its target.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Immune.title: Immune
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/Immune.description: The Immune Processor determines whether an Effect is allowed to be applied.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/index.title: Preprocessor
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/index.description: The Preprocessor stage runs before an Effect enters its main processing pipeline and before it is applied.

Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/ModifierC.title: Modifier Count Limit
Assets/Processor/Preprocessors/ModifierC.description: The Modifier Count Limit Processor limits how many Modifiers can be added to a Stat. If the configured limit has already been reached, the incoming Effect is blocked and the Modifier is not added.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Add.title: Add
Assets/Processor/Processors/Add.description: The Add Processor calculates the Effect value and adds the resulting value to the target Stat.

Assets/Processor/Processors/index.title: Processors
Assets/Processor/Processors/index.description: The Processor stage is the main stage of the processing pipeline where Effects are applied to their target Stats.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Injector.title: Injector
Assets/Processor/Processors/Injector.description: The Injector Processor processes Injector Effects and adds the configured Injector to the target Stat.

Assets/Processor/Processors/InjectorRemo.title: Injector Remover
Assets/Processor/Processors/InjectorRemo.description: The Injector Remover Processor processes Injector Remover Effects and removes Injectors from the target Stat according to the filtering rules defined by the Injector Remover Effect.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Linker.title: Linker
Assets/Processor/Processors/Linker.description: The Linker Processor processes Linker Effects and links another Stat to the target Stat by adding the configured Linker.

Assets/Processor/Processors/ModifierRemo.title: Modifier Remover
Assets/Processor/Processors/ModifierRemo.description: The Modifier Remover Processor processes Modifier Remover Effects and removes Modifiers from the target Stat according to the filtering rules defined by the Modifier Remover Effect.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Set.title: Set
Assets/Processor/Processors/Set.description: The Set Processor calculates the Effect value according to the processed Effect's configuration and directly sets the target Stat's RawValue to the resulting value.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.title: Conditional Modifier
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.description: The Conditional Modifier Processor modifies the Effect value according to the conditions and contribution rules defined by the resolved Conditional Modifier Stat and its Signature.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.title: Critical Hit
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.description: The Critical Hit Processor determines whether the incoming Effect becomes a critical hit and, if successful, applies a multiplier contribution to the Effect value.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.title: Modifier
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.description: The Modifier Processor modifies the Effect value according to the contribution rules defined by the resolved Modifier Stat and its Signature.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.title: Multiplier Against Suppressor
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Con.description: The Multiplier Against Suppressor Processor calculates a multiplier based on the relationship between the incoming Attribute Stat and its corresponding Suppressor Stat, then adds the result to the Effect's Contribution Data as a Multiplier contribution.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Fee.title: Feedback
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Fee.description: Feedback Processors are responsible for generating gameplay feedback after an Effect has been processed.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Block By Result Attribute
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Block By Result Attribute Processor blocks an Effect according to the Result Attributes added during the processing pipeline.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Limiter
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Limiter Processor is available for Numerable Stats.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Min Max Offset
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Min Max Offset Processor adds a percentage offset to the calculated Effect value based on the Minimum and Maximum Offset Stats.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Reflector
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Reflector Processor redirects the final calculated Effect value to one or more Actors according to the configuration defined by the resolved Reflector Stat and its Signature.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Shield
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Shield Processor consumes the value of a Shield Stat before the calculated Effect value is applied to the target Stat.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Counter Effect
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Standard Postprocess Counter Effect is the signed version of the Postprocess Counter Effect Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.title: Modifier Replacer
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pos.description: The Modifier Replacer is the signed version of the Postprocess Modifier Replacer Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Cast Restrictor
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Cast Restrictor is the signed version of the Preprocess Cast Restrictor Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Counter Effect
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Counter Effect is the signed version of the Preprocess Counter Effect Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Director
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Director is the signed version of the Preprocess Director Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Effect Attribute Eliminater
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Effect Attribute Eliminater is the signed version of the Preprocess Effect Attribute Eliminater Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Hit Rate
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Hit Rate is the signed version of the Preprocess Hit Rate Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Modifier Count Limit
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: The Modifier Count Limit is the signed version of the Preprocess Modifier Count Limit Processor.

Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.title: Reflector
Assets/Processor/Processors/Standard/Pre.description: It allows reflection to be performed according to the incoming Effect value sign and redirects the final calculated Effect value to one or more Actors based on the configuration defined by the resolved Reflector Stat and its Signature.

Assets/Processor/Processors/TimerModifie.title: Effect Timer Modifier
Assets/Processor/Processors/TimerModifie.description: The Effect Timer Modifier Processor processes Effect Timer Modifier Effects and modifies the remaining duration of active Modifiers.

Assets/Stat/Container.title: Container
Assets/Stat/Container.description: Each Container stores Stat Definitions of a specific type.

Assets/Stat/Environment.title: Environment
Assets/Stat/Environment.description: A Stat Environment groups different types of Stat Containers together.

Assets/Stat/Repository.title: Repository
Assets/Stat/Repository.description: A Stat Repository holds one or more Stat Environments.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Actor.title: Actor
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Actor.description: An Actor Stat stores a reference to an Actor.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/ConditionalMo.title: Conditional Modifier
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/ConditionalMo.description: A Conditional Modifier is a Modifier that is executed only when its condition is satisfied.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/DurationModif.title: Duration Modifier
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/DurationModif.description: A Duration Modifier Stat modifies an Effect's duration during the Duration Process.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EffectBundle.title: Effect Bundle
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EffectBundle.description: An Effect Bundle Stat inherits from Effect Pack Stat.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EffectPack.title: Effect Pack
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EffectPack.description: An Effect Pack Stat stores one or more Effect Packs.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EventBasedEff.title: Event Based Effect
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/EventBasedEff.description: An Event Based Effect Stat triggers an Effect when a specific event occurs.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Generator.title: Generator
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Generator.description: A Generator Stat automatically generates or consumes its value over time.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/index.title: Stat Definition
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/index.description: A Stat Definition is a data asset that defines a Stat's values, properties, and behavior.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Limiter.title: Limiter
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Limiter.description: A Limiter Stat limits an incoming Effect value based on configurable rules.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Modifier.title: Modifier
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Modifier.description: A Modifier defines logic that modifies an Effect's value.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/Cla.title: Clamped
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/Cla.description: A Clamped Stat restricts its final Value to remain within a minimum and maximum range.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/Edg.title: EdgeValue
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/Edg.description: An EdgeValue Stat is a specialized Clamped Stat whose Value is determined by the selected border of its candidate values.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/ind.title: Numerable
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Numerable/ind.description: A Numerable Stat is the base type for all numeric Stats.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Co.title: Counter Effect
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Co.description: A Counter Effect is a Redirector that triggers another Effect in response to an incoming Effect.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Di.title: Director
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Di.description: A Director is a Redirector that redirects the Effect itself during the Preprocess or Precontribution stages.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/in.title: Redirector
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/in.description: A Redirector is the base class for components that redirect incoming Effects during processing.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Re.title: Reflector
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Redirector/Re.description: A Reflector is a Redirector that redirects an Effect's final value after it has been fully processed.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/StateBasedEff.title: State Based Effect
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/StateBasedEff.description: A State Based Effect Stat automatically triggers an Effect when the configured Stat condition is satisfied.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/String.title: String
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/String.description: A String Stat stores text values.

Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Vector.title: Vector
Assets/Stat/StatDefinition/Vector.description: A Vector Stat stores a vector value.

Assets/Stat/StatKey/StatKey.title: Stat Key Model
Assets/Stat/StatKey/StatKey.description: A Stat Key Model uniquely identifies the location of a Stat within a Stat Repository.

Assets/Stat/StatKey/StatKeyModel_SigSep.title: StatKeyModel_SigSep
Assets/Stat/StatKey/StatKeyModel_SigSep.description: A StatKeyModel_SigSep uniquely identifies a Stat stored inside a SigSep Stat.

Components/Actor.title: Actor
Components/Actor.description: Actors are runtime entities that contain Stats and participate in Effect interactions.

Components/Effector.title: Effector
Components/Effector.description: An Effector is responsible for sending Effects to a target.

Components/PowerWorld.title: PowerWorld
Components/PowerWorld.description: PowerWorld is initialized using PowerWorldSettings and serves as the central hub for Power's runtime systems, such as Diplomacy, Updater, and Logging.

CoreConcepts/EffectProcessFlow.title: Effect Process Flow
CoreConcepts/EffectProcessFlow.description: When an Effect is sent in Power, it is processed by a series of Processors based on its type and configuration.

CoreConcepts/HowStatValuesAreEvaluated.title: How Stat Values Are Evaluated
CoreConcepts/HowStatValuesAreEvaluated.description: Several elements contribute to a stat's final value.

CoreConcepts/RelativeStatSeperation.title: Relative Stats for Target Stats and Attribute Stats
CoreConcepts/RelativeStatSeperation.description: A Stat can participate in an Effect in two different roles:

CoreConcepts/SignatureSeperatedStats.title: Signature Seperated Stats
CoreConcepts/SignatureSeperatedStats.description: A Signature Separated Stat is a container Stat that holds multiple child Stats.

CoreConcepts/SourceSeperatedStats.title: Source Seperated Stats
CoreConcepts/SourceSeperatedStats.description: A Source Separated Stat is both a regular Stat and a container Stat.

CoreConcepts/UseConditionalModifiers.title: Using Conditional Modifiers in Processors
CoreConcepts/UseConditionalModifiers.description: Some Processors expose UseConditionalModifier options. These allow a Stat used by the Processor to be modified dynamically according to the current context before the Processor continues its execution.

GettingStarted.title: Getting Started
GettingStarted.description: Create a doc page with rich content.

Interface/Editor.title: Editor
Interface/Editor.description: The Power Editor is the main window you'll use while working with Power.

Introduction.title: What is Power
